articles.title: Americans may have been exposed in Congo Ebola outbreak - The Washington Post

articles.description: On Monday Iran said it had responded to the latest US proposal and that exchanges with Washington were continuing.

articles.title: Ukrainian drones hit Moscow and surrounding area, killing 3 - The Washington Post
articles.description: The attack, the largest and most deadly to target the Russian capital region since the invasion of Ukraine in 2022, showed Kyiv’s increasing ability to carry out long-range strikes.

articles.title: Trump admin considers nearly $1.8 billion fund to compensate allies targeted in DOJ investigations, sources say - CNN

articles.title: Midlife exercise could add two healthy years to your lifespan, study finds - The Washington Post
